query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS pillar_findings (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  verification_id INT NOT NULL,
  pillar ENUM('pricing', 'materials', 'compliance', 'terms') NOT NULL,
  finding_id VARCHAR(10) NOT NULL,
  fact TEXT NOT NULL,
  evidence_ref VARCHAR(100),
  benchmark_ref VARCHAR(100),
  interpretation VARCHAR(100),
  risk_statement TEXT,
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  INDEX idx_verification_pillar (verification_id, pillar)
);

  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  verification_id INT NOT NULL,
  pillar ENUM('pricing', 'materials', 'compliance', 'terms') NOT NULL,
  finding_id VARCHAR(10) NOT NULL,
  fact TEXT NOT NULL,
  evidence_ref VARCHAR(100),
  benchmark_ref VARCHAR(100),
  interpretation VARCHAR(100),
  risk_statement TEXT,
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  INDEX idx_verification_pillar (verification_id, pillar)
);
